version_description: This has fewer chord changes and simplified chords - it's not exact, by any means, but it works, especially for GCEA ukulele.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Sittin On The Dock Of The Bay

content:
[Intro]
[tab]( [ch]Dm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch] ) 3x
( C )  /E /G /C[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]     ([ch]Em[/ch])     [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
There must be some misunderstanding[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]     ([ch]Em[/ch])  [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
There must be some kind of mistake[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
I waited in the rain for hours[/tab]
             C  /E /G /C
And you were late


[Verse 1]
[tab]         [ch]Dm[/ch]      ([ch]Em[/ch])   [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Now it's not like me to say the right thing[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dm[/ch]       ([ch]Em[/ch])      [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
But you could've called to let me know[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dm[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
I checked your number twice, don't understand it[/tab]
          C  /E /G /C
So I went home


[Bridge 1]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]      [ch]Cm/Ab[/ch]       [ch]Bb[/ch]
Well I'd been waiting for this weekend[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Cm/Ab[/ch]    [ch]Bb[/ch]
I thought that maybe we could see a show[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                          [ch]Fm[/ch]
Never dreamed I'd have this feeling[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                     [ch]Fm[/ch]
Oh but seeing you is believing[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
That's why I don't know why[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
You didn't show up that night[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]     ([ch]Em[/ch])     [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
There must be some misunderstanding[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]     ([ch]Em[/ch])  [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
There must be some kind of mistake[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Dm[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
I waited in the rain for hours[/tab]
             C  /E /G /C
And you were late


[Bridge 2]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                   [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Cm/Ab[/ch]         [ch]Bb[/ch]
Since then I've been running around trying to find you[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch]             [ch]Cm/Ab[/ch]     [ch]Bb[/ch]
I went to the places that we always go[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                           [ch]Fm[/ch]
I rang your house but got no answer[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]                              [ch]Fm[/ch]
Jumped in my car, I went round again[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gm[/ch]
I still don't believe it[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
He was just leaving[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]     ([ch]Em[/ch])     [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
There must be some misunderstanding[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dm[/ch]     ([ch]Em[/ch])  [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
There must be some kind of mistake…[/tab]
